Services for Families: The Belonging Hub Services for Childcare Centers

Let's build a classroom you'll love

We offer comprehensive support for early childhood educators, programs, and families to build inclusive, responsive learning environments through expert coaching, training and professional development.

Get in touch →

Tailored Solutions for
Your Early Learning Community

Whether you're looking to implement the Inclusive practices, strengthen team collaboration, or build family partnerships, we offer evidence-based coaching and training designed specifically for your program's unique needs. With expertise in inclusive practices, trauma-informed approaches, and social-emotional learning, our services support sustainable change that empowers children, educators, and families.
Our Socio-Emotional Learning Series

Little Social Stars

8–Week Social–Emotional Bundles for Early Childhood Classrooms

Transform your classroom into a thriving space where children build friendship skills, emotional regulation, and problem‑solving confidence—all grounded in inclusivity.

Little Social Stars packages the evidence‑based, relationship‑focused practices you need into ready‑to‑implement 6‑week bundles: weekly child sessions, live staff learning, simple visuals, and optional family touchpoints.

Everything you need. Nothing extra to figure out.
Explore Our Bundles Book a Fit Call

Add-On and Supporting Services

🤝

Individual Coaching and Consultation

Working with a specific child or situation that needs more personalized support? Book individual coaching sessions to problem-solve in real time and build educator confidence.

Perfect for: Refining strategies after a bundle, addressing challenging moments, or coaching individual children with additional support needs.

→
📈

Professional Development Workshops

Deepen your team's skills with focused training on trauma-informed practices, anti-bias curriculum, or advanced inclusion practices.

Perfect for: Pairing with Little Social Stars for a full learning experience or standalone professional development.

→
👥

Group Coaching Workshop Series

Structured, practice-based coaching sessions for educator teams focused on a single social–emotional topic. Build skills systematically with peer learning and real-time problem-solving.

Perfect for: Multi-room programs wanting coordinated staff learning, building a cohesive SEL approach, or deepening skills in one specific area.

→
💛

Handle with Care Training

Evidence-based training on supporting children with trauma histories, understanding dysregulation, and creating physically and emotionally safe spaces. Learn practical strategies for responding to challenging behaviors with compassion and skill.

Perfect for: Programs serving children with adverse experiences, building educator confidence in trauma-informed practice, or refreshing your whole team on these critical skills.

→
🧩

Inclusion Training

Learn to create genuinely inclusive environments where ALL children—including those with identified delays or disabilities—belong and thrive. Explore Universal Design for Learning, differentiation, and practical collaboration with families and specialists.

Perfect for: Programs committed to true inclusion, teams new to working with diverse learners, or staff seeking to deepen inclusive practices across routines and learning activities.

→
🤝

Family Partnerships and Engagement

Bring families into the conversation. Host family coffee chats, parent workshops on emotion coaching, or community learning circles.

Perfect for: Standalone use or as an add-on to your Little Social Stars bundle.

→
🏫

Program Consultation

Need a strategic refresh of your inclusion practices, social–emotional curriculum, or program structure? Book a consultation to build your custom plan.

→
📝

Curriculum Development

Partner with us to audit, redesign, or build a social–emotional curriculum tailored to your program's philosophy, children's needs, and educator capacity. Create intentional, connected learning experiences.

Perfect for: Programs refreshing their approach, integrating inclusion principles into existing curriculum, or building a comprehensive SEL scope and sequence.

→

How does it work?

01
Initial Consultation
We connect to discuss your program's needs, goals, and current situation. This helps me customize services that align with your vision.
02
Customized Planning
Based on our conversation, a tailored approach will be taken, including timelines, delivery format, and specific outcomes for your team.
03
Engaging Sessions
Interactive workshops or coaching sessions designed for adult learning. Evidence-based content delivered in accessible, practical ways.
04
Reflection & Growth
Regular check-ins and reflection to monitor progress, celebrate successes, and adjust approaches as needed.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you work with programs of all sizes?

Yes! We work with everything from small family childcare homes to large multi-site programs. We customize services to fit your program's size, structure, budget and needs.

Do you work with individuals or a group of particular educators?

Yes! We work with individual educators or a group of educators (for example, a group of toddler teachers) as per the need, and we deliver workshops, offer coaching services specific to these groups.

Can services be delivered in-person or virtually?

Absolutely. Most services can be delivered either in-person (ideal if I can visit your program) or online via Zoom or other platforms. We can discuss which format works best for your situation.

What if my program doesn't have an inclusive background?

That's perfectly fine! We can meet you wherever you are. Whether you're just learning about inclusion or implementing it, we customize coaching and training to match your current knowledge and goals.

How much do services cost?

Pricing varies based on the service, duration, and format (individual vs. group, in-person vs. virtual, etc.). We offer flexible packages, and we are happy to work within many budgets. Please reach out to discuss options specific to your needs.

Can you create custom services for our specific needs?

Absolutely! Yes! We are happy to create custom packages that address your program's unique challenges and priorities. Contact us to discuss what you're looking for.

How long does implementation typically take?

This depends on your goals and current practices. A single workshop might be a one-time event, while coaching or consultation typically spans several months to allow for meaningful change. We'll outline realistic timelines during our initial consultation.

Ready to Strengthen Your Program?

Let's discuss how I can support your team's growth and create positive change for educators, children, and families. I'm here to partner with you on your early learning journey.
